---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for Timetraked. Features augment or impact end user experience and requires design input.
title: "Feature: [short description]"
type: Feature
assignees:
  -  AdamJ
---

**Is this a new component or an extension of an existing one?**
- [ ] New component
- [ ] Extension of existing component

**Describe the feature**
A clear and concise description of the new feature. What is the expected behavior?

**Are there visuals for this feature? If applicable, please include examples for each state and for varying widths**
Include screenshots or links to designs.

**Any other information?**
